description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: Walnut Heights - No School (Presidents Day week)
events.description: No school February 12th–16th. Listed as "No School - Presidents Day" in the classroom newsletter (Winter/February newsletter).

events.title: Double Author Visit - Walnut Heights
events.description: Two authors will visit the school on March 12th. If students would like books signed on the day of the visit, order through Rakestraw Bookstore and ship to the school (shipping address provided in the newsletter: 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596). No specific time listed in the newsletter; books will be delivered and signed the day of the visit.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK & K)
events.location: Walnut Heights MPR — 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten students on Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 9:30 AM in the Walnut Heights MPR. There will be a livestream for those who cannot attend; the livestream link will be sent out a few days before the event. Contact: Mrs. Gold (jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org).
